3332690.name: Sweet Home 3: Look and Find Collector's Edition
3332690.description:
Avi Games brings you the next part of the hidden object game "Sweet Home: Look and Find". Enjoy an even cozier collection of hidden-object tasks and mini games with Sweet Home Look and Find 3!

Relax, get comfortable, and enjoy finding objects, solving puzzles, and conquering mini-games on an exciting journey to various places imbued with warmth and comfort! Take a walk in nature, sit by the pool, and even barbecue in the backyard! Use your skills and knowledge to find all the hidden objects and complete the mini-games as you kick back and challenge yourself in this blissful hidden-object game!

The Collector’s Edition includes:

  • Eight new locations to find many more objects!

  • Eight exclusive mini-games to challenge your skills!

  • Bring the cozy atmosphere into your own home with a handy music player!

  • Check out a collection of beautiful downloadable wallpapers!
3332690.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语
